panels.description: Total number of connection failures between the ADFS server and the Active Directory domain controller(s)
panels.name: Login Connection Failures

panels.description: Total number of User Certificate authentications. I.E. smart cards or mobile devices with provisioned client certificates
panels.name: Certificate Authentications

panels.description: Total number of device authentications (SignedToken, clientTLS, PkeyAuth). Device authentication is only available on ADFS 2016 or later
panels.name: Device Authentications

panels.description: Total number of authentications from Microsoft Passport (now named Microsoft Account)
panels.name: Passport Authentications

panels.description: Total number of Windows integrated authentications using Kerberos or NTLM
panels.name: Windows Integrated Authentications

panels.description: Total number of passive (browser-based) requests
panels.name: Passive Requests

panels.description: Total number of extranet lockouts. Requires the Extranet Lockout feature to be enabled
panels.name: Extranet Account Lockouts

panels.description: Total number of incoming requests to the OAuth Authorization endpoint
panels.name: Oauth Authentications

panels.description: Total number of requested access tokens
panels.name: Token Requests

panels.description: Total number of Federation Metadata requests
panels.name: Federated Metadata Requests

panels.description: Total number of authentications from federated sources. E.G. Office365
panels.name: Federated Authentications

panels.description: Total number of failed password changes. The Password Change Portal must be enabled in the AD FS Management tool in order to allow user password changes
panels.name: Password Change Failed

panels.description: Total number of succeeded password changes. The Password Change Portal must be enabled in the AD FS Management tool in order to allow user password changes
panels.name: Password Change Succeeded

panels.description: Total number of successful AD U/P authentications
panels.name: Userpassword Authentications Success

panels.description: Total number of failed AD U/P authentications
panels.name: Userpassword Authentications Failure

panels.description: Total number of successful SSO authentications
panels.name: SSO Authentications Success

panels.description: Total number of failed SSO authentications
panels.name: SSO Authentications Failure

panels.description:
- received: Number of successful zone transfers (AXFR/IXFR) received by the secondary DNS server
- sent: Number of successful zone transfers (AXFR/IXFR) of the master DNS server
panels.name: DNS Zone Transfer Success

panels.description: Total number of successful OAuth client Authentications
panels.name: Client Authentication Success

panels.description: Total number of failed OAuth client Authentications
panels.name: Client Authentication Failure

panels.description: Total number of successful RP tokens issued for OAuth Client Credentials Requests
panels.name: Client Credentials Success

panels.description: Total number of failed OAuth Client Credentials Requests
panels.name: Client Credentials Failure

panels.description: Total number of successful OAuth Client Private Key Jwt Authentications
panels.name: Client Privkey Jwt Success

panels.description: Total number of failed OAuth Client Private Key Jwt Authentications
panels.name: Client Privkey Jwt Failure

panels.description: Total number of successful OAuth Client Secret Basic Authentications
panels.name: Client Secret Basic Authentications Success

panels.description: Total number of failed OAuth Client Secret Basic Authentications
panels.name: Client Secret Basic Authentications Failure

panels.description: Total number of successful OAuth Client Secret Post Authentications
panels.name: Client Secret Post Authentications Sucess

panels.description: Total number of failed OAuth Client Secret Post Authentications
panels.name: Client Secret Post Authentications Failure

panels.description: Total number of successful OAuth Client Windows Integrated Authentications
panels.name: Client Windows Authentications Sucess

panels.description: Total number of failed OAuth Client Windows Integrated Authentications
panels.name: Client Windows Authentications Failure

panels.description: Total number of successful RP tokens issued for OAuth Logon Certificate Requests
panels.name: Logon Certificate Requests Success

panels.description: Total number of failed OAuth Logon Certificate Requests
panels.name: Logon Certificate Requests Failure

panels.description: Total number of successful OAuth Password Grant Requests
panels.name: Password Grant Requests Success

panels.description: Total number of failed OAuth Password Grant Requests
panels.name: Password Grant Requests Failure

panels.description: Total number of successful RP tokens issued over OAuth protocol
panels.name: Token Requests Success

panels.description: Total number of successful authentications from external MFA providers
panels.name: External Authentications Success

panels.description: Total number of failed authentications from external MFA providers
panels.name: External Authentications Failure

panels.description: Total number of successful RP tokens issued over SAML-P protocol
panels.name: Token Requests Success

panels.description: Total number of successful RP tokens issued over WS-Fed protocol
panels.name: WS-Fed Token Requests Success

panels.description: Total number of successful RP tokens issued over WS-Trust protocol
panels.name: WS-Trust Token Requests Success

panels.description: Total number of failures connecting to the artifact database
panels.name: DB Artifact Failure

panels.description: Accumulator of time taken for an artifact database query
panels.name: DB Artifact Query Time Seconds

panels.description: Total number of failures connecting to the configuration database
panels.name: DB Config Failure

panels.description: Accumulator of time taken for a configuration database query
panels.name: DB Config Query Time
